welcome.title: Welcome to AtlasFile
welcome.subtitle: Intelligent document management system for projects.
welcome.filesLocationInfo: Folder chosen at install time. To change it, edit PROJECTS_HOST_ROOT in .env and restart the containers.
welcome.filesLocationHint: Chosen at install time. To change it, edit .env and restart the containers.

projects.nameHint: It will be created as a subfolder under Projects/
projects.nameInvalid: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, _ and - (no spaces or accents)

llm.title: Set up the assistant (optional)
llm.subtitle: AtlasFile can use an LLM to classify documents and answer questions about your projects.
llm.keyValid: ✓ Valid key — LLM classification will be enabled (tag_only) for the project
llm.keyInvalid: ✗ Invalid key — you can continue and adjust it later in Settings
llm.keyUnreachable: Could not verify the key right now (not blocking — carry on normally)
llm.keyHint: Stored locally in your browser. You can configure it later in Assistant Settings.

done.title: All set!
done.projectCreated:
Project {{label}} created.
Drag your files onto any screen — the portal uploads and processes everything automatically (classification, routing, indexing and search).
done.llmActivated: ✓ LLM classification enabled (tag_only) — documents will be enriched at ingest.
done.manualAlternative: Manual alternative: copy files to and click Process INBOX on the Dashboard.

authGate.title: This installation requires an API key
authGate.subtitle: Authentication is enabled on this server. Paste the key shown at the end of the installation (install.sh --enable-auth). It stays in this browser only.
authGate.invalidKey: Invalid API key or missing permission. Check the key shown at the end of the installation.
